# Get Paper IDs

Get Paper IDs

## Usage

``` r
paper_id(paper)
```

## Arguments

- paper:

  a paper or paperlist

## Value

a table with paper_id column

## Examples

``` r
paper_id(psychsci)
#>              paper_id
#> 1    0956797613520608
#> 2    0956797614522816
#> 3    0956797614527830
#> 4    0956797614557697
```
